answer: In the last 30 days, permits in the 78702 area clustered most heavily at 2915 E Cesar Chavez St, with 11 permits issued. Other notable clusters include 2810 E 2nd St and 924 E 7th St Unit 500 and Unit 400, each with 4 permits. Several other addresses, such as 1702 Garden St and 2306 Willow St, saw 3 permits each.
